LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT RECEIVED CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ACKNOWLEDGING SERVICE OF THE MOTION AND WAIVING ANY DEFECT IN THE PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CARLA PRADO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (301/AJR) JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-19-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court received correspondence from plaintiff's counsel acknowledging service of the motion and waiving any defect in the proof of service. The Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT CARLA PRADO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (301/AJR) Judge A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
